action_boundary: Should change CHG-826 execute at the requested UTC time?
communication_boundary: Convert the site-local approval window to UTC before deciding. The visible UTC time alone is not the approval window.

documents.text: Change request REQ-CHG826 asks to execute CHG-826 at 18:30Z on 2026-07-03.
Approval window WIN-CHG826 authorizes CHG-826 from 14:00 to 16:00 ET on 2026-07-03.
Facility note TZ-SITE-R states the site uses ET and ET equals UTC-4 on 2026-07-03.
Change approval APP-CHG826 binds CHG-826, site R, and approval window WIN-CHG826.
Change execution requires the execution time to fall inside the approved local site window after timezone conversion.
